concept: Construct an arcade experience where you pilot a sentient kite navigating through atmospheric layers to reunite scattered cloud families. Ride thermal updrafts, dodge weather phenomena, and collect string extensions to access higher altitudes and perform advanced aerial maneuvers. Form alliances with birds and other airborne creatures to overcome obstacles like electrical storms and industrial pollution. Your ultimate goal is to reach the stratosphere where the legendary eternal rainbow contains the secret to freeing all kites from their earthly tethers.
